trends.headline: Congress Requires Pentagon to Address UFO Disinformation
trends.summary: In 1988, a recently retired U.S. Air Force Office of Special Investigations (OSI) Agent claimed on live television that the government was working with aliens at a secret base in the Nevada desert called Area 51 and that the “extraterrestrials have complete control of this base.” In the program, the producers blacked out the OSI …

trends.headline: “We’ve Got Our People Working on It Right Now”: Defense Secretary Provides Update on Pentagon Disclosure of UFO Files
trends.summary: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says Pentagon officials are currently working to initiate the release of government files on UFOs.

trends.headline: Review: In an Age of Disinformation, “Saucers, Spooks and Kooks” is the Real Disclosure Film
trends.summary: If you’re tired of never-ending promises of UFO disclosure, have I got a movie for you.

trends.headline: Pentagon’s UFO Program confusion and how the New York Times got it wrong
trends.summary: There has been much confusion about the alleged secret Pentagon UFO program the New York Times exposed in 2017, and the problems stem from factual errors and omissions in the article. According to the contract solicitation, the Pentagon created the Advanced Aerospace Weapon Systems Applications Program (AAWSAP) under the Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA) to research …

trends.headline: World UFO Day 2025 – Enigma Research Lab Provides UAP Data
trends.summary: Enigma has curated a selection of user-submitted sightings from our 300,000+ report archive and brought them to life in an interactive new website: https://enigmaarchives.io/. The site invites users to examine real UAP cases using the same tools researchers rely on—from radar overlays and weather patterns to flight paths and eyewitness testimony. It’s part educational, part …

trends.headline: Huge Luminous Bar of Light Captured on Video Over Spokane Valley, Washington
trends.summary: “It was like a giant light bar,” reports a witness who recorded a video of a large luminous object floating across the night sky over Spokane Valley and submitted it via the Enigma UFO reporting app. “This thing flew right over top of us the best way that I can describe,” the witness continued. “The …

trends.headline: “They’re Real, But I Haven’t Seen Them”: Former President Obama Issues Statement After “Alien” Remarks Go Viral
trends.summary: Comments by former President Barack Obama sparked debate online this Valentine’s Day weekend, after a podcast appearance where he said extraterrestrials were real.

trends.headline: All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office Hosts Private Workshop with Civilian Researchers, Universities, and Government Agencies
trends.summary: A recent AARO report outlines new standards for data collection, AI use, privacy, and civilian collaboration in advancing UAP research.

trends.headline: Trump Orders Release of Alien and UFO Files, But There’s a Catch: Nothing Is Declassified, Yet
trends.summary: Trump orders UFO files released—but without declassification, the most sensitive evidence could remain hidden from public view.

trends.headline: Open Minds UAP News: Where do we go from here?
trends.summary: In this episode we discuss the state of UAP research and the best path forward. We also cover the latest UAP headlines and look at some recent UAP videos. trends.headline: Caso Histórico de OVNI no Brasil Chega ao Capitólio Nos 30 Anos do Incidente de Varginha
trends.summary: Leslie Kean e Ralph Blumenthal relatam as discussões entre legisladores americanos e testemunhas brasileiras, marcando o terceiro aniversário do "Incidente OVNI de Varginha".

trends.headline: The 1975 Lumberton UFO Wave: Police Across North Carolina Report a Silent V-Shaped Craft
trends.summary: In the early morning hours of April 3, 1975, shortly after a violent thunderstorm swept through southeastern North Carolina, police officers in the town of Lumberton began reporting something unusual in the sky.
